name: Tiled GEMM (Triton)
trigger: Matrix multiplication or GEMM-like operation, compute-bound for large matrices
approach: Tiled GEMM with @triton.autotune over BLOCK_M/N/K in {64,128,256}. Use tl.dot for tensor core utilization. Accumulate in float64 for fp32 correctness (avoids atol=1e-4 failures from accumulation order). For large GEMMs (>2048): cuBLAS via torch.matmul is likely near-optimal — focus on dispatch overhead reduction instead.
